text:
In France (children and adults) live with Crohn's disease or ulcerative colitis
(UC). 20% are children.

It is not a contagious disease and significant progress has been made to better understand the
causes of this disease. We now know that there are
genetic and external factors, such as
the environment. It is not caused by any particular
food. And it is not because you are
anxious or nervous that you are sick.

I
